reviews.comment:
Opcion ideal si estas en viaje para cargar combustible. Paro ahi desde hace mas de 30 años! Si pasas por ahí seguro el calor te dejara sin aliento. La nafta es buena , ser un ACA, lo que no es bueno es el shop. Caro y poca variedad. Baños limpios, dato importante!!!

(Translated by Google)
An ideal option if you're traveling to fill up with gas. I've been stopping there for over 30 years! If you drive by, the heat will surely take your breath away. The gas is good, being an ACA, what's not so good is the convenience store. Expensive and limited in variety. Clean bathrooms, an important fact!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNnFQbTRnRRAB
